Trait.name: Strong
Trait.label: Strong
Trait.description: Possesses well above-average physical strength.

Trait.name: Weak
Trait.label: Weak
Trait.description: Possesses below-average physical strength.

Trait.name: Tough
Trait.label: Tough
Trait.description: Body withstands injury and hardship far better than most.

Trait.name: Fragile
Trait.label: Fragile
Trait.description: Body is unusually susceptible to injury and harm.

Trait.name: Fast Healer
Trait.label: Fast Healer
Trait.description: Wounds and injuries close and mend at an accelerated rate.

Trait.name: Slow Healer
Trait.label: Slow Healer
Trait.description: Wounds and injuries take much longer than normal to heal.

Trait.name: Iron Stomach
Trait.label: Iron Stomach
Trait.description: Digestive system easily tolerates spoiled food and toxins that would sicken others.

Trait.name: Weak Stomach
Trait.label: Weak Stomach
Trait.description: Digestive system is easily upset, leading to frequent nausea and vomiting.

Trait.name: High Pain Tolerance
Trait.label: High Pain Tolerance
Trait.description: Endures pain far better than most, remaining functional despite serious injury.

Trait.name: Pain Sensitive
Trait.label: Pain Sensitive
Trait.description: Feels pain far more intensely than most, making injuries especially debilitating.

Trait.name: Nearsighted
Trait.label: Nearsighted
Trait.description: Struggles to clearly see objects that are far away.

Trait.name: Farsighted
Trait.label: Farsighted
Trait.description: Struggles to clearly see objects that are close up.

Trait.name: Asthmatic
Trait.label: Asthmatic
Trait.description: Suffers from a chronic respiratory condition that causes shortness of breath under exertion.

Trait.name: Bad Back
Trait.label: Bad Back
Trait.description: Chronic back pain reduces the amount of weight that can be comfortably carried.

Trait.name: Deaf
Trait.label: Deaf
Trait.description: Cannot hear, relying on other senses to perceive the surrounding world.

Trait.name: Mute
Trait.label: Mute
Trait.description: Cannot speak, communicating instead through gesture or writing.

Trait.name: Blind
Trait.label: Blind
Trait.description: Cannot see, relying on other senses to navigate the world.

Trait.name: Night Vision
Trait.label: Night Vision
Trait.description: Eyes are naturally adapted to see clearly in low-light conditions.

Trait.name: Anosmic
Trait.label: Anosmic
Trait.description: Has no sense of smell, unable to detect scents both pleasant and dangerous.

Trait.name: Insomniac
Trait.label: Insomniac
Trait.description: Struggles to fall or stay asleep, leading to chronic fatigue.

Trait.name: Chronic Pain
Trait.label: Chronic Pain
Trait.description: Lives with a lingering old injury that causes persistent discomfort.

Trait.name: Weak Immune System
Trait.label: Weak Immune System
Trait.description: Falls ill more easily and recovers from sickness more slowly than most.

Trait.name: High Stamina
Trait.label: High Stamina
Trait.description: Possesses exceptional endurance, able to exert themselves for long periods without tiring.

Trait.name: Maimed
Trait.label: Maimed
Trait.description: Has lost, or permanently lost the use of, a limb, limiting physical capability.
